comments.body: Classification: infrastructure (CI secret not configured). Root cause: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY GitHub secret is not set in the repository. The workflow file (.github/workflows/eval-daily.yml:55) correctly references ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }} but the secret does not exist. This is the same root cause as 4312-8d67 (2026-04-05 eval regression). Resolution requires repo admin to configure the GitHub secret. Escalating to user.
comments.author: Test
